introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Luna Park in Sydney, New South Wales, Australia. Opened in 2021, it is a mirror clone of Rewind Racers at Adventure City in Anaheim, California, USA. It was built by Gerstlauer.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In November 2020, Luna Park announced a $30 million overhaul. This update would include several new attractions, including three roller coasters. One of these coasters would be Boomerang.

Boomerang opened on 23 October 2021.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.

fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Luna Park in Sydney, New South Wales, Australia. Opened in 2021, it is a mirror clone of Rewind Racers at Adventure City in Anaheim, California, USA. It was built by Gerstlauer.

In November 2020, Luna Park announced a $30 million overhaul. This update would include several new attractions, including three roller coasters. One of these coasters would be Boomerang.

Boomerang opened on 23 October 2021.



Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.
